_comment: Hot-loaded by paper orchestrator (codex_revise.py). Edit this file (saved as .lint_patterns.json without .template) and changes apply on the next dispatched round, no orchestrator restart needed. Each pattern is a Python regex source string (JSON-escaped: each backslash is doubled).
_forbidden_vocab_note: ASCII words use \b...\b word boundary so 'patch' does NOT match inside 'dispatch'. CJK words pattern-match as-is.
_forbidden_math_note: Only the label-namespace-polluting environments are blocked. Plain \[ ... \] display math is allowed — pdflatex compiles it identically to $$ ... $$, and the gate was wasting paper rounds on a style preference.
